subject: Sunset Music | 4-Year Luxury Hotel Experience
body:
Dear Cour du Corbeau Events Team,

I've spent 4 years as resident artist at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore), creating ambient sunset sessions for hotel guests.

My format: RAV Vast + subtle live looping, perfect for:

  • Aperitivo hour
  • Poolside/terrace ambiance
  • Special events

Sample: Rocca di Arona - Full Sunrise Set

I'm exploring similar collaborations in France for 2026 season.

Kind regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Artist | @flutur_8

subject: Sunset Sessions Artist | 4-Year Hotel Residency | RAV Vast Live
body:
Dear Estalagem da Ponta do Sol Music Team,

I'm reaching out regarding sunset music programming at Estalagem da Ponta do Sol.

Quick background:

  • 4 years resident artist at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore) - Buddha Bar style sunset sessions
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist with live looping
  • Greece's Got Talent appearance (4 YES votes)

My sound: Buddha Bar style sunset/sunrise sessions → Rocca di Arona - Full Sunrise Set

I'd love to discuss a guest session or residency opportunity for 2026 season.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Artist | @flutur_8
